title: ophrys bertolonii subsp. dalmatica
intro: Ophrys bertolonii subsp. dalmatica, also known as the Dalmatian bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is native to the Balkan Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys bertolonii subsp. dalmatica include treating digestive issues, sore throats, and coughs, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, or it can be made into a powder for use in capsules or ointments.
